positive: A sophisticated botanical illustration featuring an arrangement of exotic flowers (like orchids and monstera leaves) and delicate vines. Designed in the style of a vintage scientific etching or mid-century natural history plate. Muted earth tones and deep greens. Clean borders, high detail, engraving style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern, neon, abstract, digital paint
